violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Hot dog roller not provided with adequate sneeze protection.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Seal bare-wood edges to particle board shelving in kitchen.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Duct tape used to repair inside of ice machine lid.
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
